name: Comparison — Qualitative vs Quantitative Research Methods
input: Compare qualitative and quantitative research methods. Qualitative: exploratory, small sample sizes (10-50), interviews and focus groups, thematic analysis. Quantitative: confirmatory, large sample sizes (100-10000), surveys and experiments, statistical analysis.
qualityCriteria: Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Two-column comparison with clear headers, each listing 4 bullet points. Color-coded (blue vs green). Icons for each attribute.

data.title: Qualitative vs Quantitative Research

items.label: Qualitative
items.description: Exploratory approach using interviews, focus groups, and thematic analysis with small samples (10-50 participants)

items.label: Quantitative
items.description: Confirmatory approach using surveys, experiments, and statistical analysis with large samples (100-10,000 participants)

data.caption: Key differences between qualitative and quantitative research methodologies
